caption: A screen recording displays the website RANDOM.ORG, where a user is utilizing a "Dice Roller" tool. The site features a header with the text "RANDOM.ORG" and a warning stating, "Advisory: We only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain. Other sites that claim to be operated by us are impostors." A sidebar chat shows messages from "glowing27" and "Nightbot," including a link: "http://bit.ly/NzSdekK49". A small inset video window at the bottom shows a man with short brown hair and a beard wearing a black shirt. Across the bottom of the screen is a banner for "JASPY S CASEBREAKS.COM". Initially, the page shows a "Roll 2 virtual dice" option with buttons for "Roll Dice" and "Reset Form." Following a click, the page refreshes to show the result: "You rolled 2 dice: ⚁ ⚁" with a timestamp of "2023-05-20 03:12:58 17 UTC."
